name: Taco Pie
recipeIngredient: 6 1/2 oz pizza crust mix, see note
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F. Prepare a pie plate with cooking spray and flour; set aside.
To prepare crust, combine pizza crust mix and water until moistened. Cover and let rest for 5 minutes. Press dough into prepared pie plate.
Meanwhile, to prepare filling, in a skillet over medium heat, cook turkey, bell peppers, and onions until no pink remains in the turkey and vegetables are tender. Drain excess fat.
Stir in taco seasoning mix; simmer on low heat for 5 minutes.
Sprinkle 1 cup tortilla chips over the bottom of the crust.
Spoon meat mixture over the crust and tortilla chips.
Spread sour cream over the meat mixture.
Cover with shredded cheese.
Sprinkle remaining tortilla chips on top.
Bake in preheated oven for 20 to 25 minutes.
